title: Savory Smoky Mediterranean Tofu Skewers
description: A festive Mediterranean dish featuring barbeque sauce and nuka-pickle, perfect for a plant-based friendly gathering
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper
Add the chopped nuka-pickle to the bowl and stir to combine
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the marinated tofu onto the soaked bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking, then grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally
After 5 minutes of grilling, brush the skewers with barbeque sauce
Continue grilling for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the tofu is golden brown and crispy on the outside
Remove the skewers from the grill and serve hot on a lazy-susan-spinner
